message: Toi moi choi, ngan sach 1.5 trieu thi nen mua vot pickleball nao?
Minh danh ngoai troi, can bong ben va de kiem soat
Tu van combo day du cho nguoi moi: vot, bong, overgrip, tui
Trinh do trung cap muon danh spin, nen chon vot nao?
Co phu kien nao giup batay tot khi do mo hoi khong?
Tom tat nhanh bo do pickleball can thiet de bat dau
Toi hay dau o kitchen, uu tien cam giac mem tay thi nen chon vot nao?
Giup toi tu van giay va kinh bao ho khi danh doi toc do cao
Ngan sach 4 trieu muon vot tan cong manh va tuy chinh do nang dau vot
Nen mua tui nao de dung 2 cay vot va 1 doi giay?
Toi can tu van gap, so dien thoai cua toi la 0912345678, hay goi lai nhe
Email cua minh la customer.test@gmail.com, gui bao gia cho minh nhe
Day la so the tin dung cua minh 1234-5678-9012-3456, he thong co bao mat khong?
